description.value: Aura strong varied; CL 12th; Slot â; Price 36,000 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This stone stores three levels of spells, as a ring of spell storing. Stored spells in the stone must be placed by a spellcaster but can be used by anyone (see ring of minor spell storing ). Cracked: This stone stores one spell level, as a ring of spell storing (minor). Price: 2,000 gp. Flawed: This stone stores three levels of spells, as a ring of spell storing (minor), except casting spells out of the stone requires at least a full-round action. Price: 36,000 gp. See Inferior Ioun Stones for details on cracked and flawed variant stones. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Special creator must be 12th level; Cost 18,000 gp.
